title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, allowed in OS settings, new UI
scenario: Verify notification UI updates correctly when user denies notifications during onboarding but later enables them via OS settings
steps: During onboarding, select "Don't Allow" for notifications
Finish onboarding and open the app
Navigate to App Settings > General > Notifications
Try to switch the Notifications toggle ON
Check the new UI in the app for notifications
expected: All notification settings are unlocked and set to ON, and the user can modify them.
